question: Find the films that are in inventory at store 1 but NOT at store 2.
final_sql:
SELECT film.title, store.store_id, COUNT(DISTINCT inventory.inventory_id) AS result
FROM inventory
LEFT JOIN film ON inventory.film_id = film.film_id
LEFT JOIN store ON inventory.store_id = store.store_id
GROUP BY film.title, store.store_id

question: Find the films that are in inventory at store 1 but NOT at store 2
final_sql:
SELECT film.film_id, film.title, COUNT(DISTINCT inventory.inventory_id) AS result
FROM inventory
LEFT JOIN film ON inventory.film_id = film.film_id
LEFT JOIN store ON inventory.store_id = store.store_id
WHERE LOWER(store.store_id) = %s
GROUP BY film.film_id, film.title
AND film.film_id NOT IN (
SELECT inventory.film_id
FROM inventory
LEFT JOIN store ON inventory.store_id = store.store_id
WHERE LOWER(store.store_id) = %s
)
